CVE-2026-40393.title: In Mesa before 25.3.6 and 26 before 26.0.1, out-of-bounds memory  ...
CVE-2026-40393.description: In Mesa before 25.3.6 and 26 before 26.0.1, out-of-bounds memory access can occur in WebGPU because the amount of to-be-allocated data depends on an untrusted party, and is then used for alloca.
